Patch Set 13: Code-Review-1

This change is breaking the dropdown style of the system and may be breaking other components. I could notice that in the UI tests screenshots.
For example:
https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/sdc-integration-tests-master-verify-java/577/integration-tests/target/ExtentReport/UI/screenshots/service-created-ee12aeb72ae1.png

Patch Set 15:

looks like changes of dropdown menu not related to my commit,
https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/sdc/+/121466 produces same screenshot
https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/sdc-integration-tests-master-verify-java/580/integration-tests/target/ExtentReport/UI/screenshots/service-created-ecb355f50bcd.png
same for 
https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/sdc/+/121405
https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/sdc-integration-tests-master-verify-java/557/integration-tests/target/ExtentReport/UI/screenshots/service-certified-823426d54359.png

dropdown menu shown differently on Chrome and Firefox

Patch Set 15:

> Patch Set 13: Code-Review-1
> 
> This change is breaking the dropdown style of the system and may be breaking other components. I could notice that in the UI tests screenshots.
> For example:
> https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/sdc-integration-tests-master-verify-java/577/integration-tests/target/ExtentReport/UI/screenshots/service-created-ee12aeb72ae1.png

Vasyl saw that this is the same style for past UI tests runs, then we figured out that is just a different style for the Firefox dropdown, which is the one that the UI tests use. I was using Chrome to check, I'm sorry for that.
